title: Phase 23 — Engine Effectiveness Verdict
rule: Grade engines by whether they move measurable KPIs. Stop or change engines graded D or F.

last_10_actions_audit.action: Blog duplicate thin tool link fix (4 links)
Internal links: 23 contextual links to parent calculators

last_10_actions_audit.current_result: NEUTRAL — thin tools still get impressions. Parent calculators still 0 impressions.
POSITIVE — canonical now consistent. But 0 impressions on parent.
POSITIVE — no thin tool optimization since freeze.
POSITIVE — GSC data now fresh and verified daily.

ctr_engine.reason: Blog/20000-loan CTA upgrade is the only CTR test running. 0 clicks so far (just deployed). All other CTR work was on thin tools (Phase 20) and was frozen. VERDICT: Active but not proven. Keep the one test running. Stop all other CTR tweaks until this test proves or disproves CTR can be moved without authority.
ctr_engine.action: KEEP_ONE_TEST — monitor blog/20000-loan. Stop all other CTR work.

internal_link_engine.reason: 38 contextual links added across 2 days. All to real pages. Well-structured. But 0 measurable ranking impact yet. Internal links from 0-authority pages to 0-authority pages don't transfer meaningful PageRank. VERDICT: Well-executed but limited by domain authority. Keep adding but don't expect ranking miracles.
internal_link_engine.action: CONTINUE but downgrade expectations. Internal links help crawl and discovery, not ranking.

indexing_engine.reason: 7 GSC UI indexing requests made. 4 confirmed, 3 likely. 0 confirmed newly indexed. Monitoring schedule active. VERDICT: Request execution is good. But indexing alone doesn't produce traffic — indexed pages with 0 impressions (Group C) prove this.
indexing_engine.action: MONITOR_ONLY. No more requests. Let Day 3-21 schedule run.

content_upgrade_engine.reason: Blog 20000-loan CTA upgrade is the only content change recently deployed. Decision pages have good content already. Calculator pages have rich auto-generated content. The problem is NOT content quality — it's authority. VERDICT: Content is adequate. More content tweaks won't change rankings without backlinks.
content_upgrade_engine.action: STOP content tweaks. Content is adequate. Focus on authority.

outreach_engine.reason: 20 initial outreach emails sent. 0 replies. 0 backlinks. VERDICT: Current approach is failing. Must change pitch, prospects, or channel.
outreach_engine.action: CHANGE — Try Jun 13 follow-ups with value-first widget pitch. If 0/12 replies: pivot to HARO/journalist outreach or guest posting.

tool_scenario_cleanup_engine.reason: Thin template softening completed. Thin tool/scenario SEO frozen. Cannibalization review in progress. VERDICT: Guardrail is working. Cleanup test remains blocked. This is a quality-control engine, not a growth engine.
tool_scenario_cleanup_engine.action: HOLD — cleanup test blocked until data pipeline + template fixes complete + monitoring done.

overall_engine_verdict: QFINHUB's SEO engine is structurally sound but fundamentally limited by 0 domain authority. Internal SEO (links, content, indexing, data) is well-executed. The outreach engine (the only path to authority) is failing. UNTIL BACKLINKS ARRIVE, no engine can produce measurable ranking results.
